houseRules.title: DOUBLE TROUBLE
houseRules.description: Everyone submits 2 answer cards this round.

houseRules.title: WORST ANSWER WINS
houseRules.description: Judge must pick the worst answer.

houseRules.title: SPEED ROUND
houseRules.description: Players only have 30 seconds to submit.

houseRules.title: WINNER RUNS THE HOUSE
houseRules.description: Round winner becomes the next judge.

houseRules.title: SILENT ROUND
houseRules.description: No reading cards out loud this round.

houseRules.title: STEAL A POINT
houseRules.description: Winner steals 1 point from another player.

houseRules.title: REVERSE WINNER
houseRules.description: Least funny answer wins this round.
